creator: freebsd@llsmurf.eu
text:
Thank you for your review, Zsolt.

$mailer indeed is a leftover from debugging this. Shouldn't be changed. Thank you.

All other changes to the Makefile you are referring to, weren't introduced by my patch, but of course it make sense to clean this up as well. I will work on this as well.

I will send another comment once the corrected files are both replaced here.
